meaning: n.行动者,搬运家具的人,原动力,鼓吹者
examples: The United States is more than ever the prime mover in Middle East peace-making.
Wal-Mart has learned the hard way that a first-mover advantage can be important in international retailing.
Julie Bailey, the prime-mover behind the campaign, denies he is being made a scapegoat.
